results.title: War of words erupts between Minister Chandrasekar and Archchuna in North
results.description: A heated argument broke out between Jaffna District MP Archchuna Ramanathan and Fisheries Minister Ramalingam Chandrasekar during the Kilinochchi District Coordination Committee meeting held yesterday (16). A video footage of the incident shows the MP and the Minister engaging in a heated verbal exchange, following which a physical confrontation appeared to develop when the Minister [...]

results.title: US lawmakers warn China expanding espionage, cyber operations targeting American states
results.description: Washington, July 17 (SocialNews.XYZ) US lawmakers and state security officials warned that China is increasingly using espionage, cyber intrusions, influence operations and economic leverage to target US states and critical infrastructure, telling a House Intelligence... results.title: Junior Minister On HRC 2025 Annual Report
results.description: “I am pleased today to submit to this Honourable House the Annual Report of the Human Rights Commission for the year ending 31st December 2025,” Junior Minister of Youth, Social Development and Seniors Senator Lindsay Simmons said in the Senate.
